text.title: Semantic Tokens and Modes Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the token-config artefact: declares layers, modes, semantic tokens, and the platform output pipeline. Validator enforces required keys and per-field constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: Missing __faion_header__; format must be dtcg; missing layers / pipeline / visual_regression; raw hex in source; intent missing; mode coverage incomplete.

list.item: Component-layer tokens referencing reference layer directly (skipping system layer).
Mode list with only `light` when product ships dark mode.
Raw hex values in `tokens.system` $value (must use reference-token alias `{color.blue.600}`).
